title: VanMod
description: Modpack with an immersive gameplay effect, vanilla friendly.
body:
![Screenshot of the game logo. The rainy background shows a village with shaders on.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fdb14747ee1c36f09545deca5b9aa08c1629eab_0.webp)
Explore a carefully chosen collection of mods that enhance your survival experience while maintaining full compatibility with vanilla Minecraft servers. Enjoy subtle improvements, immersive environmental effects, and quality-of-life enhancements that enrich your adventure without altering the core gameplay. Perfect for players who want to deepen their survival journey without sacrificing the classic Minecraft feel!
Features

📸 Improved first-person camera that deeply immerses you in the action
🎵 Enhanced game sounds for a more immersive audio experience
🦸‍♂️ Improved character visuals with 3D effects and flowing capes
⚡ Enhanced optimization for smoother gameplay
